title: WhatsApp notification on new order placement

requirements.text: When a new order is successfully placed via the placeOrder backend function, immediately trigger a WhatsApp notification to the number 9137202881 (formatted as +919137202881) by opening a pre-filled WhatsApp message URL. The notification must be sent from the frontend immediately after a successful order placement (i.e., after the placeOrder mutation resolves successfully). The message must include: Order ID, buyer's full name, country, phone number, address, a list of all ordered items (product name and quantity for each), the order total in € (Euro), and the order timestamp. Construct the WhatsApp deep-link URL as https://wa.me/919137202881?text=<URL-encoded message> and open it in a new browser tab (window.open) so the admin/owner receives the notification. The notification flow must not block or interfere with the customer's order confirmation redirect.

quotes: Send me a notification with full order details and items list whenever a new order is place and I want a notification on my number or WhatsApp 9137202881

acceptanceCriteria: After a customer successfully places an order, a new browser tab opens with a pre-filled WhatsApp message to +919137202881.
The WhatsApp message includes the Order ID.
The WhatsApp message includes the buyer's full name, country, phone number, and address.
The WhatsApp message includes a list of all ordered items with product name and quantity for each item.
The WhatsApp message includes the order total formatted with the Euro (€) symbol.
The WhatsApp message includes the order timestamp.
Opening the WhatsApp notification tab does not block the customer from being redirected to the Order Confirmation page.
The notification is triggered inside the onSuccess callback of the placeOrder mutation in Cart.tsx (or useQueries.ts), after the order is confirmed.

constraints: Do not use any third-party SMS, email, or push notification services.
Do not modify backend/main.mo for this feature — the notification is purely a frontend concern triggered after a successful placeOrder mutation.
The WhatsApp notification must target exactly +919137202881 (wa.me/919137202881).
Do not block or replace the existing order confirmation page redirect flow.
nonGoals: SMS notifications via Twilio or any other SMS service.
Storing notification logs in the backend.
Requiring the customer to send the WhatsApp message themselves — the tab should open automatically.
